name: Sigrid Hearthward
title: Inn Keeper
description: A broad-shouldered northern woman who keeps the Frozen Mug's hearth roaring and its beds warm against the arctic cold. No traveler is turned out into the snow on her watch.

greeting.first_time: Come in from the cold, traveler! I'm Sigrid, keeper of the Frozen Mug. A warm bed and a roaring hearth await — care to rent a room?
greeting.returning: Back again, and half-frozen by the look of you. Need a room?
greeting.tired: You're chilled to the bone. Take a room and thaw out by the hearth.

ask_rent_room.text: A warm bed for the night runs 50 gold — fur blankets and a banked fire included. Want it?

confirm_rent_room.success: The bunk room's yours — head up and use the Sleep option once you're settled. Rest well against the cold.
confirm_rent_room.failure: A room's 50 gold, friend. Come back when your purse is heavier.

sleeping.text: *snoring softly by the banked hearth* Zzzz...

off_duty.text: The Mug doesn't open till evening, friend. Come back when the hearth's lit and I'll see you to a room.

goodbye.text: Stay warm out there, and mind the wastes to the east.
